title: OCI Password Spraying Attack
description: Detects password spraying by monitoring failed OCI Console login attempts across multiple user accounts. Unlike brute force (many attempts against one user), password spraying tries a few passwords against many accounts to avoid lockout thresholds.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and (('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.consolesignon.login' and Status = 'Failure')) | stats distinctcount('User Name') as distinct_users by 'Source IP' | where distinct_users > 5
falsepositives: Employees with expired or rotated passwords
